statement: An independent validation estimator was executed over the readiness-cleared DEU and native chain families and passed its internal consistency gate.
The scoped internal independent-validation log-BF-style diagnostic for DEU minus native may be reported with caveats.
The independent-validation result may be compared to the formal/proxy evidence lineage as a consistency diagnostic.
TT_lite remains diagnostic-only and was not part of the sampled posterior/evidence likelihood.
scope: scope caveat required whenever TT_lite is mentioned
